symptom: Immersive scene remained around 5 FPS by observation and fell back after zoom trails were fixed.
environment: staging.danielsmith.io, including Chrome with hardware acceleration disabled

disprovenOrUnconfirmed.theory: Broad per-frame JS update loop was the primary bottleneck
disprovenOrUnconfirmed.evidence: Phase diagnostics were added, but confirmed waste was render pixel cost, postprocessing, mirror rendering, and missing adaptive downgrades.
